response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a director-level IC with ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13-16 years depending on counting freelance work, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at the level this position requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
Demonstrated community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale a Principal role expects
Career trajectory is senior IC, not director-level technical leadership or strategy advisory
No Master's/PhD in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level IC expectation
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
